statement: In every magma, Equation 2914 (`x = ((y * (x * y)) * y) * z`) implies Equation 2171 (`x = ((y * z) * x) * (z * z)`).
lean_statement:
theorem problem_normal_0063
    {G : Type*} (op : G → G → G)
    (h : ∀ x y z : G, x = (op (op (op y (op x y)) y) z)) :
    ∀ x y z : G, x = (op (op (op y z) x) (op z z))
